prompts.name: T1_trivial_loop
prompts.prompt: Write a Python script that prints numbers from 1 to 100, one per line. No explanation. Only code.

prompts.name: T2_fibonacci
prompts.prompt: Write a Python function that returns the first 20 Fibonacci numbers as a list, then prints them. No explanation. Only code.

prompts.name: T3_caesar_cipher
prompts.prompt: Write a Python script implementing Caesar cipher with shift=13 (ROT13). Include encrypt and decrypt functions. Test with the string 'Hello World'. No explanation. Only code.
prompts.notes: More structure, tests if algorithmic choices vary

prompts.name: T4_sorting_algo
prompts.prompt: Write a Python implementation of merge sort. Include a test with the list [5, 2, 8, 1, 9, 3]. Print the sorted result. No explanation. Only code.
prompts.notes: Classic algorithm — may have style variations

prompts.name: T5_class_design
prompts.prompt: Write a Python class 'BankAccount' with methods: deposit(amount), withdraw(amount), balance(). Constructor takes owner name and initial balance=0. Add a __str__ method. No explanation. Only code.
prompts.notes: OOP design — naming and structure likely to vary

prompts.name: T6_regex_parser
prompts.prompt: Write a Python script that uses regex to extract all email addresses from this text: 'Contact us at admin@example.com or support@test.org for help. Invalid: not-an-email'. Print each email on a line. No explanation. Only code.

prompts.name: T7_api_client
prompts.prompt: Write a Python script that fetches the JSON from https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/1 using the requests library and prints the title field. No explanation. Only code.

prompts.name: T8_game_of_life
prompts.prompt: Write a Python implementation of Conway's Game of Life for a 10x10 grid. Initialize with a glider pattern. Run 5 steps and print each grid state. No explanation. Only code.
prompts.notes: Complex — high chance of variation. Key stress test.
